abusefilter-blocked-display: Ficilkan si otomaatig ah ayaa loo aqoonsaday inuu waxyeello leeyahay, sidaas darteed waa lagaa hor istaagay inaad fuliso. Intaa waxaa dheer, si loo ilaaliyo {{SITENAME}}, akoonkaaga isticmaalaha iyo dhammaan cinwaannada IP-ga ee la xiriira waa la xanibay wax ka beddelka. Haddii tani ay khalad tahay, fadlan la xiriir maamule. Sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan xeerka xadgudubka ee ficilkaagu la jaanqaaday waa: $1
abusefilter-log-hide-forbidden: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku qarin karto gelitaanka diiwaanka xadgudubka.
abusefilter-log-hide-no-change: Dhammaan aqoonsiyada la xushay hore ayay u leeyihiin muuqaalka la doonayo.
log-action-filter-rights-blockautopromot: Xannibaadda kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah
log-action-filter-rights-restoreautoprom: Soo celinta kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah
logentry-rights-blockautopromote: $1 {{GENDER:$2|wuxuu xannibay}} kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah ee {{GENDER:$4|$3}} muddo $5 ah
logentry-rights-restoreautopromote: $1 {{GENDER:$2|wuxuu soo celiyey}} awoodda kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah ee {{GENDER:$4|$3}}
logentry-abusefilterblockeddomainhit-hit: {{GENDER:$2|$1}} wuxuu sababay in domain la xannibay lagu dhufto $3 isagoo isku dayay inuu ku daro $4
abusefilterprivatedetails-log-name: Diiwaanka gelitaanka faahfaahinta gaarka ah ee AbuseFilter
log-name-abusefilterblockeddomainhit: Diiwaanka ku dhufashada domain-ka la xannibay
abusefilter-list-lastmodified: Markii ugu dambeysay ee la beddelay
abusefilter-blocked-domains-intro: Xiriirrada dibadda ee u dhigma liiskan waa la xannibi doonaa marka lagu daro bogga. Domain-yadan waxaa lagu kaydiyaa [[MediaWiki:BlockedExternalDomains.json]]. Isku dayga lagu daro xiriirro la xannibay waxaa lagu diiwaangeliyaa [[Special:Log/abusefilterblockeddomainhit]].
abusefilter-blocked-domains-domain-added: Ku dar domain dibadda oo la xannibay $1 oo leh faallo: $2
